race.description: DAPHNE BANNAN MEMORIAL GREAT EASTER STAKES (L)
race.comment: IRON HAWK (14) really announced himself with a brace of impressive wins, including his last start 2 weeks ago by nearly 3 weeks ago. He jumps up sharply in class, but drops 7kg, which will help negate his wide gate. The hat-trick beckons. WITZ END (3) got back too far in a strong field here 2 weeks ago over 1600m, and he failed to run on as expected. His record over 1400m is much better, and he can make amends immediately. TEXAS DOLLY (12) caught the eye with a solid late run to finish fourth here a fortnight ago over 1200m, The extra 200m can help, and drawing wide could be an advantage by this time of the day. Include her in all top 4 combos. SPOT ON TIME (1) needed his first run back from a spell here 2 weeks ago, and he has not missed a cheque in 3 starts second up in the past. Include. INFLAMED (2) can secure the right run early, and she can figure in the top 3 here.
race.rail_position: True  | No  Rain Last 24 Hours | 17mm Rain Last 7 Days
